nodes.label: Umzug Database Migrations
nodes.rationale: Versioned, idempotent migrations (Umzug + SequelizeMeta, same approach as Sequelize CLI) applied automatically on app startup and via scripts/migrate.mjs. connection.sync only creates brand-new tables; ANY change to an existing table must be a migration. Helpers in migrationHelpers.js (e.g. addColumnIfMissing) keep re-runs safe when SQL was already applied manually.
